title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your account settings and integrations.

password.title: Change Password
password.description: Update your password to keep your account secure.

sso.title: Single Sign-On
sso.description: This account is linked to the following SSO providers.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Manage API keys for programmatic access to your account.
apiKeys.emptyHint: Create an API key to access Nexo programmatically.
apiKeys.createDescription: Create a new API key to access Nexo programmatically.
apiKeys.createdDescription: Copy your API key now. You won't be able to see it again!
apiKeys.keyWarning: Make sure to copy your API key now. You won't be able to see it again!
apiKeys.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this API key? This action cannot be undone.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: Receive HTTP notifications when events occur in your account.
webhooks.emptyHint: Create a webhook to receive notifications about events.
webhooks.createDescription: Configure a webhook endpoint to receive event notifications.
webhooks.createdDescription: Copy your webhook secret now. You'll need it to verify webhook signatures.
webhooks.secretWarning: Store this secret securely. You won't be able to see it again!
webhooks.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this webhook? This action cannot be undone.

actions.title: Actions
actions.description: Automate workflows with triggers and actions.
actions.emptyHint: Create an action to automate your workflows.
actions.createDescription: Set up an automated action with a trigger and steps.
actions.noSteps: No steps added. Click "Add Step" to add an action.
actions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this action? This action cannot be undone.
